## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Add a new latent-action paper or system
- [ ] Update an existing entry
- [ ] Add or update an implementation link
- [ ] Add or update a benchmark/probe entry
- [ ] Clarify a borderline or uncertain candidate
- [ ] Fix formatting, consistency, or broken links

## Files Updated

- [ ] `README.md`
- [ ] `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] `.github/pull_request_template.md`
- [ ] Other repository maintenance files

## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] I used official links when possible.
- [ ] I linked arXiv entries to the `abs` page, not the PDF.
- [ ] Each model entry has `repr`, `obj`, `data`, and `use` tags.
- [ ] I added or updated the matching `Models at a glance` row.
- [ ] The entry satisfies C1/C2, or I labeled it `[Borderline]` and explained why.
- [ ] I did not add duplicate full entries across sections.
- [ ] Markdown tables still render correctly after my edits.

## Notes

Add any context reviewers should know, such as scope caveats, archived links, missing code, or tag vocabulary changes.
